w:r.w:t: Kindness and courtesy/We need eyes to see
Kindness and courtesy/We need eyes to see
IL will present demonstration in front of pupils then she will make exercise of pupils for being courteous and showing them respect.
IL will call 2 pupils and they will demonstrate how to help others.
IL will tie a piece of cloth on one pupil’s eye and ask him about his feelings. She will explain them that how they will feel if they do not have eyes.
Pupils will tell the importance of eyes.
IL will explain the activities, and after that they will do their work independently on booklet.
age #24. IL will mention the day and date on top of the page and check at the end.
IL to do a 5 min warm up with the pupils.
What is the national language of Pakistan?
is the national language of Pakistan.
Which Dua do we say when we go downstairs. Ans:
How do you see the things?
We see things with our eyes.
